column1: # Description: Documents the current telemetry coverage status for
#   every OT asset. Cross-references with the OT_AssetRegister to
#   identify monitoring gaps on crown jewel-adjacent systems.
# Usage: Maintain alongside the OT_AssetRegister watchlist. Update
#   as new telemetry sources are deployed. Use to drive the gap
#   analysis in Practical Step 1 and to prioritise deployment in
# OS                 : string  — Operating system and version
# EDRProduct         : string  — Vendor/product name if deployed
# FirewallLogCoverage: string  — Yes (visible in firewall logs)
# NetworkMonitoring  : string  — Yes (covered by Zeek/Suricata TAP)
# OT_NDR_Coverage    : string  — Yes (covered by commercial NDR)
# IdentifiedGaps     : string  — Description of monitoring gaps
# GapMitigation      : string  — Compensating controls in place
# LastAssessed       : date    — Date of last assessment
